response.global_summary: The video begins with an MC dialogue segment featuring four virtual characters (Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, and two guests) that lasts from 00:00 to 02:30. Following the dialogue, the characters perform a cover of the song "DISCOTHEQUE" (originally by Nana Mizuki).
